docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNESE-ROSE, MONIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARSHALL, TOMMY $200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE 100% INTEREST PROVISION OF THE LOAN IS UNENFORCABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY JOHNESE-ROSE, MONIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT MARSHALL, TOMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNESE-ROSE, MONIQUE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00WAIVED) SERVED JAN-19-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARSHALL, TOMMY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JOHNESE-ROSE, MONIQUE
